presets.name: ChatGPT — Technical Documentation
presets.basePrompt: Write technical documentation for a REST API endpoint. Include: endpoint URL, HTTP method, request parameters with types, response schema, error codes, and a curl example. [Constraints: Use OpenAPI 3.0 format. Include rate limiting notes.]

presets.name: Claude — Policy Analysis
presets.basePrompt: Analyze the proposed AI regulation policy. Structure: 1) Summary of key provisions, 2) Impact assessment on startups vs enterprises, 3) Comparison with EU AI Act, 4) Unintended consequences, 5) Recommendations. [Constraints: Cite specific sections. Note ambiguities.]

presets.name: Kimi — Literary Translation
presets.basePrompt: Translate the following Chinese poem into English while preserving: meter, imagery, cultural references, and emotional tone. Provide: literal translation, poetic translation, and translator's notes on difficult choices. [Constraints: Maintain line breaks. Annotate cultural allusions.]

presets.name: MiniMax — Social Media Campaign
presets.basePrompt: Create a 5-post social media campaign for a new eco-friendly sneaker launch. Each post should have: hook, body copy, CTA, and suggested visual description. [Constraints: Platform-specific (Instagram/Twitter/LinkedIn). Include hashtag strategy.]
